themes.name: Neon Midnight
themes.recipe: the warm-vivid one. neo → neon (neon gas glows orange-red) on a midnight blue-near-black night — coral accent, saturated warm palette. Chrome derived.

themes.name: Bell Bronze
themes.recipe: the warm-muted one. earthy bronze on a warm charcoal base — the one theme whose chrome stays hand-authored (overrides), not derived.

themes.name: Neon Cobalt
themes.recipe: the loud one. max-saturation electric cobalt on a deep near-black navy, high contrast. Its whole 16-color palette runs hot — so even terminal output reads unmistakably Cobalt. Chrome derived.

themes.name: Glacier
themes.recipe: the calm one. soft desaturated pastel (Nord/Catppuccin family) on a distinctly lighter slate base — low contrast, powder-blue accent. Reads completely differently from Cobalt though both are blue. Chrome derived.

themes.name: Dracula
themes.recipe: imported .itermcolors → chrome derived. Vivid pink/purple/cyan/green; still pins green=success · red=failure · yellow=warning.

themes.name: Nord
themes.recipe: imported .itermcolors → chrome derived. Arctic, desaturated, low-contrast — the canonical calm palette; Glacier's family.

themes.name: Gruvbox Dark
themes.recipe: imported .itermcolors → chrome derived. Warm retro earthy — the template Bronze reaches for.

themes.name: Catppuccin Mocha
themes.recipe: imported .itermcolors → chrome derived. Soft modern pastel; mauve accent isn't a palette slot, so it's an explicit accent override.
